data.content: Implementation review: approved. Reviewed branch codex/foolery-c6e8-opencode-idle-watchdog at d3db9c26bf7ece5d279f5b75a1e355f8d78465fa against main. The change directly addresses the kimi-k2.6 log failure mode: session.idle remains terminal, duplicate idle is deduped, post-idle OpenCode cleanup noise cannot refresh the watchdog, completed-turn cleanup cannot overwrite exitReason=turn_ended, and disposed OpenCode HTTP servers are reaped so the take loop can close. Tests cover post-idle normalized events, post-idle stderr, disposal without /abort after idle, duplicate idle, signal-only cleanup close classification, and active-turn timeout preservation. Sanity gates passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. No regressions or invariant issues found.
